zh.title: 印加预言全集 - 帕查库提大变革、五个太阳纪与盖洛长老预言 | Inca Prophecies
zh.description: 印加文明核心预言完整收录，涵盖帕查库提（Pachacuti）大变革预言、五个太阳纪宇宙观、鹰与秃鹰预言、塔里帕伊帕查（重逢时代）等Q'ero长老传承的古老智慧。

en.title: Inca Prophecies - Pachacuti, Five Suns, Eagle & Condor, Q'ero Elder Traditions | Full Archive
en.description: Complete archive of Inca prophecies including the Pachacuti transformation, Five Suns cosmology, Eagle and Condor prophecy, and Q'ero elder traditions about the Taripay Pacha — the Age of Meeting Ourselves Again.
